text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Spring Stakes arrives. 1,800
meters is still a challenging distance for Sakura
Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the Classics will be even longer. With her
spirits regained, Sakura Bakushin O happily walks
to the track.
